paragraphs: Discover real-life fireplace inspiration from our relationships with trusted tastemakers, influencers and media partners.
See how the Allusion Edge Fireplace turns a blank wall into a cozy, modern focal point that blends warmth, style, and smart design.
See how Heat & Glo transformed the Jones family’s living space with Military Makeover. A heartwarming reveal featuring the innovative Inception fireplace.
Transform your fireplace into a festive centerpiece this holiday season with decorating ideas for Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year’s.
Transform your bedroom with the Allusion Platinum electric fireplace and Boyd Buildout Kit. Create a cozy, stylish focal point that’s easy to install and perfect for any season.
Lance Anderson's Prior Lake home showcases a custom Stellar fireplace that blends modern design with functional precision, serving as the centerpiece of his living space.

Join Heather Ison as she transforms her traditional wood-burning fireplace into a stunning centerpiece with Heat & Glo’s Escape gas insert. Discover the perfect blend of style, warmth, and efficiency for your home.
See how Heat & Glo collaborated with Military Makeover to bring warmth and style to a veteran's home with their innovative Inception fireplace.
We teamed up with “Trending Today” to break five common misconceptions about fireplaces in today’s market.
Nicole of Simply Aligned Home revamped her outdated brick fireplace and partnered with Heat & Glo to create a beautiful, functional centerpiece for her home.
Get inspired with this DIY install of our most realistic electric fireplace by architect Christine Nickerson.
Lauren and Kameron from LKS Address transformed their wood-burning fireplace into a modern, efficient, and convenient Heat & Glo gas insert - perfect for year-round use in their 90s colonial home.
Explore the captivating outdoor fireplaces from HGTV's "Rock the Block." See how each team uniquely transformed their spaces, inspiring your next backyard makeover.
Find out how an unconventional electric fireplace setup on HGTV's Rock the Block showcases their flexible design possibilities.
Discover the latest in-home design on HGTV's Rock the Block, featuring sleek fireplace additions and luxurious primary bedroom makeovers that redefine modern living.

Dive into the stylish world of HGTV's Rock the Block. From organic modern to tropical retreats, discover how top designers transform living spaces with innovative fireplace designs. Unlock fresh decorating ideas and practical tips to elevate your home.
See how designer Emily Henderson combined a cozy aesthetic with a modern gas fireplace in this bedroom reveal.
Discover the world of interior design and home transformation with Cait Pappas at Nest Out West. Get inspired by her DIY projects, Heat & Glo fireplaces, and modern living space designs.
Cait Pappas from Nest Out West shares how she made her finished basement more family-friendly and inviting with a fireplace.
Learn how to infuse comfort and coziness into a spec space with pro tips from architect and DIYer Christine Nickerson.
Discover how to give your space the ultimate glow up.
Discover how to give your space the ultimate glow up.
Hunker’s design team shows how our Allusion Platinum electric fireplace added warmth to their great room with an accessible DIY and modern touches.
